g.text: Model must return the current Warsaw weather. v0.2 scoring is tool-agnostic:
semantic content of the response is required; using the registered
get_weather mock is a bonus (rewards raw adapter for tool discipline) but
not required (lets thick-harness agents pass via their own search).
What's the weather in Warsaw right now?
Showing data for easy-01-direct-weather across 8 model×adapter combinations.
